title: Metal impact on RNA 5mC in soybean seedlings
author: Chmielowska-Bąk, Jagna
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
The project concerns the possible role of RNA 5mC in the response of soybean seedlings to metal stress.  
 The planned tasks include: 
 
 evaluation of metal uptake 
 evaluation of 5mC levels in RNA 
 identification of 5mC enriched transcripts 
 5mC localization in plant tissues 
 evalution of 5mC impact on translation 
 
 The study is carried out within the project: 
 Epitranscriptomic landscape in soybean seedling exposed to metals, no. 2024/53/B/NZ9/03732, 
 financed by National Science Centre, Poland.
